reference: Hi, I am Heather, thirty-two. I had a laparoscopic appendectomy four weeks ago. It was not ruptured; I went to the hospital because the pain was in my back, and I thought it was a kidney stone. A computed tomography scan showed an inflamed appendix. Is it normal to have bloating, random stomach pain, gas, indigestion, and loose stools at this point?
text: Hi, I— I'm Heather, 32. I had a laparoscopic appendectomy 4 weeks ago, it was not ruptured. I went to the hospital because the pain was in my back, and I thought it was a kidney stone. A CT scan showed an inflamed appendix. Is it normal to have bloating, random stomach pain, gas indigestion, and loose stools at this point?
